name: well-architected review: writes both a markdown brief and a json review
command:
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/well-architected-review.sh" --workload "resilient multi-region platform" --out-dir out --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
test -f out/2026-06-08T120000Z.json && test -f out/2026-06-08T120000Z.md && echo both-files 1>&2
